title: Xylopicrum ochranthum
taxonomy: Xylopicrum ochranthum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This family is commonly known as the gentian or gentianwort family. The genus Xylopicrum is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The classification of Xylopicrum ochranthum is further categorized under the order Gentianales and the class Magnoliopsida. The plant's classification is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic analysis.
